goal: Harden execution-board truth verification and refresh latest artifacts so stale latest aliases cannot be mistaken for current marketing state.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and existing lanes are measurement-pending
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse competitor/comparison findings instead of creating siloed new research
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg is still the primary success gate
reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: recent Reddit lane is still measurement-pending, not proof of movement
comparison_backlink_queue_latest.json: prepared queue already exists and should not be regenerated
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet currently exists
distribution_lane_latest.json: stale latest-lane alias was still pointing at an older guarded state
outcome_execution_board_latest.json: stale latest status needed freshness enforcement

changes.summary: Added fail-closed freshness checks for outcome_execution_board_latest.json against the current board, distribution lane status, and runner/audit surfaces.
Added regression tests covering stale and fresh outcome-execution-board status handling during measurement-hold watch states.

independent_verifier_blockers: Reddit monitor is degraded without a fresh healthy fallback report inside the grace window.
Primary repo adoption remains measurement-pending after shipped repairs; do not issue a healthy certification artifact yet.

selected_lane_summary: Converted a cleared post-hold slot into a structural lane-repair action instead of logging another idle measurement hold.
next_truth: The loop is operationally refreshed, but it still fails certification on real measurement blockers rather than stale aliases.
